summary: Tested Live TV, Video Recorder, and Admin Live TV management features. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All features working - Live TV page with YouTube embed, Admin Live TV tab with channel management, Reporter Dashboard with 4-tab submit modal including Video Recorder.

issues: YouTube embeds show 'This video is unavailable' because test channels have placeholder URLs - this is expected per test notes, real YouTube live URLs would work correctly

passed_tests: GET /api/live-tv returns list of live channels with correct structure
POST /api/live-tv adds new channel with YouTube ID extraction
YouTube ID extraction works for multiple URL formats (watch, youtu.be, embed, live)
DELETE /api/live-tv/{channel_id} deletes channel successfully
DELETE returns 404 for nonexistent channel
POST without name/url returns 422 validation error
Admin OTP send/verify with 9876543210/123456 returns is_admin=true
Guest mode news feed accessible without auth
Guest mode categories accessible without auth
Live TV page (/live) loads with YouTube embed player
Live TV page shows LIVE badge and channel list
Live TV page shows OTHER CHANNELS section with channel switching
Bottom nav shows 'Live TV' with Radio icon
Admin Panel has 3 tabs: News, Reporters, Live TV
Admin Live TV tab has Add Channel form (name + URL inputs)
Admin Live TV tab shows channel list with LIVE badges
Admin Live TV add channel works (tested add and cleanup)
Admin Live TV delete channel works
Reporter Dashboard loads for approved reporter
Reporter Dashboard Submit News modal has 4 tabs: Text, Video, Upload, Record
Video Recorder component renders with 'Open Camera' button in Record tab
Reporter login page shows 'Login as Reporter' with phone/OTP flow
skipped_tests: Video Recorder camera functionality - requires camera permission (can't test in headless)

critical_code_review_comments: Live TV implementation is clean - uses extract_youtube_id() regex for URL parsing
VideoRecorder component uses MediaRecorder API correctly with proper state management
Admin Panel Live TV tab has proper add/delete channel functionality
Reporter Dashboard correctly shows 4 tabs including Record tab with VideoRecorder
seed_data_creation: None - used existing approved reporters and live channels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live TV features fully tested and working. Video Recorder component renders correctly but camera functionality can't be tested in headless browser. Two real channels exist in DB: TV9 Telugu Live and NTV Telugu Live with placeholder YouTube IDs that show 'Video unavailable' - this is expected behavior, real YouTube live URLs would work. Admin Live TV management (add/delete) fully functional. Reporter Dashboard 4-tab submit news modal working correctly.

mocked_apis.YouTube video feed: Still uses hardcoded data as noted in previous iteration
mocked_apis.Live TV YouTube embeds: Uses real YouTube embed iframe but test channels have placeholder URLs - functionality is correct
